title: Research Radar — Fri May 08: Advancements in Safety and Robustness for Autonomous Systems
headline: Advancements in Safety and Robustness for Autonomous Systems
summary_text: Today's research highlights significant strides in safety-critical systems for autonomous vehicles, particularly in camera reliability and V2X communication. Papers like 'Safety-Critical Camera Reliability Monitoring for ADAS' and 'Multi-Robot Coordination in V2X Environments' showcase the integration of advanced monitoring and communication techniques.
